notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a missed catch error by first baseman Nolan Schanuel, assist to third baseman Denzer Guzman.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Denzer Guzman out at 2nd. Nolan Schanuel out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Heineman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman grounds into a double play, second baseman Anthony Seigler to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Donovan Walton out at 2nd. Tyler Heineman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Heineman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman grounds into a double play, third baseman Caleb Durbin to shortstop Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Donovan Walton out at 2nd. Tyler Heineman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras reached on error
